title: clematis tournefortii
intro: Clematis tournefortii, also known as the Tournefort's clematis, is a flowering plant species in the clematis genus. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Clematis tournefortii has been found to have medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which may help to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to relieve digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, and its potential to act as a diuretic, helping to reduce fluid retention. In herbal preparations, Clematis tournefortii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
